figures_detected.description: Distributor installed on engine showing camshaft position
Cam sprocket cover showing liquid gasket application bead width 2.0-3.0 mm (0.079-0.118 in)
Plan view and cross-section of cylinder head showing liquid gasket application dimensions: 3.0 (0.118) and 3.0 (0.018) mm, with sealant and cylinder head labels
Plan view of distributor bracket aperture rubber showing gasket and sealant application with dimensions 20 (0.79) mm on both sides

notes: Make sure that position of camshaft is as shown in figure.
Liquid gasket bead width: 2.0 - 3.0 mm (0.079 - 0.118 in)

steps.text: Clean the rocker cover, ensure it is free from grease.
notes: Fit the gasket & cover within 5 minutes of applying the liquid gasket, as follows:

steps.text: Apply liquid gasket to the cylinder head as shown. Fit the gasket to the cover.
notes: Liquid gasket application dimensions: 3.0 (0.118) mm and 3.0 (0.018) mm

steps.text: Apply liquid gasket to the rubber in the distributor bracket aperture, as shown.
notes: Apply sealant 20 (0.79) mm on each side of the gasket at the distributor bracket aperture.

items.label: Cam sprocket cover liquid gasket bead width
Cylinder head liquid gasket application width (dimension 1)
Cylinder head liquid gasket application width (dimension 2)
Distributor bracket aperture sealant application length
